recentPapers.title: Towards Interpretable Clinical Trial Design: A Tensor-Based Approach
recentPapers.abstract: Applying tensor decomposition and interpretable ML to understand clinical trial design and patient outcomes.

recentPapers.title: Self-Supervised Learning for Drug Discovery and Development
recentPapers.abstract: Novel self-supervised approaches to accelerate molecular property prediction and drug discovery pipelines.

recentPapers.title: MolCLR: Molecular Contrastive Learning for Few-Shot Property Prediction
recentPapers.abstract: Contrastive learning framework for efficient few-shot prediction of molecular properties.

recentPapers.title: Learning to Manipulate Individual Objects in an Image
recentPapers.abstract: Techniques for enabling fine-grained object manipulation and editing within natural images using neural networks.

recentPapers.title: Toward Counterfactual Fairness Through Causal Graphs
recentPapers.abstract: Using causal inference and graphical models to achieve fair machine learning for vision applications.

recentPapers.title: Places: An Image Database for Deep Scene Understanding
recentPapers.abstract: A large-scale image database and neural network models for scene recognition and understanding.

recentPapers.title: Neural Guided Deductive Search for Real-Time Program Synthesis from Examples
recentPapers.abstract: Using neural networks to guide deductive synthesis, enabling real-time program generation from input-output examples.

recentPapers.title: Learning to Infer Program Sketches
recentPapers.abstract: Deep learning approach to automatically infer program structure sketches, reducing search space for synthesis.

recentPapers.title: The Sketching Approach to Program Synthesis
recentPapers.abstract: Foundational work on sketch-based program synthesis, enabling users to provide partial specifications for code generation.

recentPapers.title: Analyzing and Editing Factual Knowledge in Language Models
recentPapers.abstract: Methods for identifying, understanding, and surgically editing factual knowledge stored in neural language models.

recentPapers.title: Calibration in Deep Learning
recentPapers.abstract: Comprehensive analysis of how to improve confidence calibration in large language models.

recentPapers.title: Convolutional Neural Networks for Sentence Classification
recentPapers.abstract: Pioneering work applying convolutional neural networks to NLP tasks, achieving state-of-the-art results.

recentPapers.title: Vision-Based Mobile Robot Navigation Using Neural Networks
recentPapers.abstract: Deep learning approaches for robust visual navigation in mobile robots using end-to-end neural networks.

recentPapers.title: Self-Supervised Representation Learning for Robotics
recentPapers.abstract: Efficient self-supervised learning methods enabling robots to acquire visual representations from unlabeled data.

recentPapers.title: Learning Dexterous In-Hand Manipulation
recentPapers.abstract: Using reinforcement learning and simulation to teach robots complex dexterous manipulation skills.
